releases.title: Signal controls and cleaner backend truth
items: Added severity filters and repo status cards to the dashboard.
Added changelog data for the site and a repo-level changelog file.
Suppressed historical workflow failures once a newer successful rerun resolved them.

releases.title: Pages deployment and modular scan engine
items: Split GitHub scan logic into reusable backend modules.
Added GitHub Pages deployment and a local preview server.
Added automated issue sync and generated report JSON.

releases.title: Initial scan workflow
items: Started with a workflow-only GitHub attention scanner.
